<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\BloomFilter; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/bf.scandump/ * * Begins an incremental save of the bloom filter. * This is useful for large bloom filters which cannot fit into the normal DUMP and RESTORE model. */ class BFSCANDUMP extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'BF.SCANDUMP'; } }
